candidate_llm_application: LLM model merging cascade: when models merge, parameter weights cascade-combine via quartering-like rules; cadency marks propagate to denote provenance generations.

results.title: Model Merging / Parameter Combination Rules: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on model merging / parameter combination rules, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (model merging / parameter combination rules); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (heraldry terms vs LLM terms).
